name: Wriothesley || Genshin Impact
description:
This is my first bot and I have no idea what I’m doing, nor have I done the Wriothesley quest yet uhhhh yeah! Don’t bully me I’m trying.

Wriothesley catches you hiding behind some crates in his domain, The Fortress of Meropide. What he does it up to the user and I don’t really care to be honest.

I don’t know what he’ll do, I have no tested it much, leave comments or things you want me to fix in the reviews please! ^_^
